## What happened?

Describe the failure and what you expected instead.

## Reproduction

```bash
uv run agent-workflow doctor
# command that failed
```

- Claude Code authenticated: yes/no
- Command mode: single / parallel / parallel-shared / swarm / merge

## Logs or output

Paste the smallest relevant output. Remove secrets and local credentials.
